title: Harridan (disambiguation)
content:
The name '''"Harridan"''' referred to:

*[[Harridan (starship)]] - an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] of [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]]
*[[Harridan (planet)]] - a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the edge of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] space

{{Disambig}}
